sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n70241" key="neo/dromos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νεό-δρομος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n70241.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">just having run,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">νεοδρόμῳ λαβὼν θήρῃ,</foreign> i.e. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">νεοθήρευτον λαβών,</foreign> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0614.tlg001:106:15" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Babr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">106.15</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
